description_long: This is a rectangular, pastel green grocery bag with a sturdy, integrated handle at the top, designed for easy carrying. The front features playful branding with the 'Jolly Baby' logo and colorful Polish text, suggesting it is a children's product or themed bag. The sides are decorated with cheerful illustrations of apples, a tree, a frog, a bee, and a fish, along with additional text and playful graphics. The back displays images of a mother and child, educational activities, and more branding, indicating the bag may be used for carrying educational or playful items. The bag appears to be made of a semi-rigid, smooth plastic or laminated cardboard, giving it a structured form. The overall design is bright, inviting, and clearly targeted at families or children.
description: A pastel green, rectangular grocery bag with a built-in handle, playful branding, and colorful illustrations, designed for children or families. The bag is structured, smooth, and features educational and playful graphics on all sides.
description_view_0: Front view shows the 'Jolly Baby' logo, playful text, and a large, smooth green surface with a visible handle at the top.
description_view_1: Left side view displays apple and tree illustrations, a dog, and Polish text, with the bag's thickness and handle profile visible.
description_view_2: Back view features images of a mother and child, educational activity graphics, and more branding, covering most of the surface.
description_view_3: Right side view shows a bee, frog, and fish illustration, along with text indicating 'ponad 70 elementów', and the bag's thickness.
attribute_branding_or_logo: Yes, 'Jolly Baby' logo and colorful printed designs with Polish text and playful illustrations.
